en: Do you know how to use this English word Payment
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아? Payment

en: Payment It's a noun that means money given to someone for goods
ko: Payment. 상품이나 서비스에 대해, 또는 빚을 갚기 위해 주는 돈을 뜻하는 명사야

en: services or to pay a debt Here's an example
ko: 서비스 대가나 빚을 갚기 위한 거지. 예문이야

en: Delay their payment Delay their payment
Ever had a client delay their payment Ever had a client delay their payment
ko: 고객이 결제를 미룬 적 있어? 고객이 결제를 미룬 적 있어?

en: Ever had a client delay their payment after you've posted their food photos Yes
ko: 음식 사진 올려준 후에 고객이 결제를 미룬 적 있어?

en: I insist on a deposit up front That stops me from chasing payments for
ko: 그래서 선입금을 고집해. 그러면 몇 달씩 결제 독촉하는 일이 없어

en: months Let's review Say this out loud
Delay their payment Delay their payment
Ever had a client delay their payment
Ever had a client delay their payment

ko: 잘했어. English Class 101을 팔로우해서 더 많은 영어 수업을 들어봐
